revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{helpbox|width:200px |templatename=HelpTOC |bodyclass=plainlist |name=[[Help:Contents|Editor help]]
|group1=Wikipedia |list1= *[[Wikipedia:Contributing to Wikipedia|Contributing (overview)]] *[[Wikipedia:How to edit a page|Editing]] *[[Wikipedia:FAQ|FAQ]] *[[Help:Contents|Help]] *[[Help:Searching|Search]]
|group2=Navigation |list2= *[[Wikipedia:Contents|Contents]] *[[Wikipedia:Categorization|Categories]] *[[Wikipedia:Featured content|Featured content]] *[[Wikipedia:Contents/Portals|Portals]] *[[Wikipedia:Contents/Quick index|A-Z index]]
|group3=[[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines|Policies and guidelines]] |list3= *[[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]] *[[Wikipedia:External links|External links]] *[[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|Neutral point of view]] *[[Wikipedia:No original research|No original research]] *[[Wikipedia:Verifiability|Verifiability]] *[[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not|What Wikipedia is not]]
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia help templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{helpbox|width:200px |templatename=HelpTOC |bodyclass=plainlist |name=[[Help:Contents|Editor help]]
|group1=Wikipedia |list1= *[[Wikipedia:Contributing to Wikipedia|Contributing (overview)]] *[[Wikipedia:How to edit a page|Editing]] *[[Wikipedia:FAQ|FAQ]] *[[Help:Contents|Help]] *[[Help:Searching|Search]]
|group2=Navigation |list2= *[[Wikipedia:Contents|Contents]] *[[Wikipedia:Categorization|Categories]] *[[Wikipedia:Featured content|Featured content]] *[[Wikipedia:Contents/Portals|Portals]] *[[Wikipedia:Contents/Quick index|A-Z index]]
|group3=[[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines|Policies and guidelines]] |list3= *[[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]] *[[Wikipedia:External links|External links]] *[[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|Neutral point of view]] *[[Wikipedia:No original research|No original research]] *[[Wikipedia:Verifiability|Verifiability]] *[[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not|What Wikipedia is not]]
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia help templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{helpbox|width:200px |templatename=HelpTOC |bodyclass=plainlist |name=[[Help:Contents|Editor help]]
|group1=Wikipedia |list1= *[[Wikipedia:Contributing to Wikipedia|Contributing (overview)]] *[[Wikipedia:How to edit a page|Editing]] *[[Wikipedia:FAQ|FAQ]] *[[Help:Contents|Help]] *[[Help:Searching|Search]]
|group2=Navigation |list2= *[[Wikipedia:Contents|Contents]] *[[Wikipedia:Categorization|Categories]] *[[Wikipedia:Featured content|Featured content]] *[[Wikipedia:Contents/Portals|Portals]] *[[Wikipedia:Contents/Quick index|A-Z index]]
|group3=[[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines|Policies and guidelines]] |list3= *[[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]] *[[Wikipedia:External links|External links]] *[[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|Neutral point of view]] *[[Wikipedia:No original research|No original research]] *[[Wikipedia:Verifiability|Verifiability]] *[[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not|What Wikipedia is not]]
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia help templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{helpbox|width:200px |templatename=HelpTOC |bodyclass=plainlist |name=[[Help:Contents|Editor help]]
|group1=Wikipedia |list1= *[[Wikipedia:Contributing to Wikipedia|Contributing (overview)]] *[[Wikipedia:How to edit a page|Editing]] *[[Wikipedia:FAQ|FAQ]] *[[Help:Contents|Help]] *[[Help:Searching|Search]]
|group2=Navigation |list2= *[[Wikipedia:Contents|Contents]] *[[Wikipedia:Categorization|Categories]] *[[Wikipedia:Featured content|Featured content]] *[[Wikipedia:Contents/Portals|Portals]] *[[Wikipedia:Contents/Quick index|A-Z index]]
|group3=[[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines|Policies and guidelines]] |list3= *[[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]] *[[Wikipedia:External links|External links]] *[[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|Neutral point of view]] *[[Wikipedia:No original research|No original research]] *[[Wikipedia:Verifiability|Verifiability]] *[[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not|What Wikipedia is not]]
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia help templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{helpbox|width:200px |templatename=HelpTOC |bodyclass=plainlist |name=[[Help:Contents|Editor help]]
|group1=Wikipedia |list1= *[[Wikipedia:Contributing to Wikipedia|Contributing (overview)]] *[[Wikipedia:How to edit a page|Editing]] *[[Wikipedia:FAQ|FAQ]] *[[Help:Contents|Help]] *[[Help:Searching|Search]]
|group2=Navigation |list2= *[[Wikipedia:Contents|Contents]] *[[Wikipedia:Categorization|Categories]] *[[Wikipedia:Featured content|Featured content]] *[[Wikipedia:Contents/Portals|Portals]] *[[Wikipedia:Contents/Quick index|A-Z index]]
|group3=[[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines|Policies and guidelines]] |list3= *[[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]] *[[Wikipedia:External links|External links]] *[[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|Neutral point of view]] *[[Wikipedia:No original research|No original research]] *[[Wikipedia:Verifiability|Verifiability]] *[[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not|What Wikipedia is not]]
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia help templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=HelpTOC here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=HelpTOC for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{helpbox|width:200px |templatename=HelpTOC |bodyclass=plainlist |name=[[Help:Contents|Editor help]]
|group1=Wikipedia |list1= *[[Wikipedia:Contributing to Wikipedia|Contributing (overview)]] *[[Wikipedia:How to edit a page|Editing]] *[[Wikipedia:FAQ|FAQ]] *[[Help:Contents|Help]] *[[Help:Searching|Search]]
|group2=Navigation |list2= *[[Wikipedia:Contents|Contents]] *[[Wikipedia:Categorization|Categories]] *[[Wikipedia:Featured content|Featured content]] *[[Wikipedia:Contents/Portals|Portals]] *[[Wikipedia:Contents/Quick index|A-Z index]]
|group3=[[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines|Policies and guidelines]] |list3= *[[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]] *[[Wikipedia:External links|External links]] *[[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|Neutral point of view]] *[[Wikipedia:No original research|No original research]] *[[Wikipedia:Verifiability|Verifiability]] *[[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not|What Wikipedia is not]]
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia help templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
